name: Remote System Discovery (loopback only)
description: Discover hosts visible on the loopback interface and the local ARP cache, without scanning external networks. MITRE ATT&CK T1018. Localhost-scoped: pings 127.0.0.1 only, then dumps the existing arp cache. Read-only, no remote probes. Safety: refuse-by-default unless --target <whitelisted_IP> or --unsafe-local.
exec: ping -c 1 -W 1 127.0.0.1 2>/dev/null | head -5; echo '---'; ip neigh show 2>/dev/null || arp -a 2>/dev/null || true
